freeEdit.title: Free editing:
freeEdit.description: You can change font, color, and other settings from the toolbar while typing. The editor won't close!

position.title: Position adjustment:
position.description: After applying, you can adjust the position, size, and rotation of the text using Gizmo.

persianFonts.title: Persian fonts:
persianFonts.description: For Persian text, be sure to use fonts like IRANSans.

steps.title: Select mesh
steps.description: First, select a part (mesh) of the model.

steps.title: Start typing
steps.description: The editor automatically opens in the center. Start writing.

steps.title: Format
steps.description: Use the toolbar above the text to change font, size, and color.

steps.title: Apply
steps.description: Click the check button or press Ctrl+Enter to apply the text to the model.

alerts.selectMesh: First select a part of the model to add text.
alerts.editorOpen: Text editor has automatically opened. Start typing!

hint.title: Start writing

hint.tip: 💡 Tip: Text will be placed at the center of the selected mesh.
